close_reason: Added typescript to mappings.nix with Nix-resolved node/tsc paths
description:
Add TypeScript configuration options to turnkey flake-parts/devenv modules:

1. Add typescript options to buck2 config:
   - typescript.enable
   - typescript.depsFile (path to typescript-deps.toml)
   - typescript.packageJsonFile

2. Add tsdeps-gen to default registry

3. Generate tsdeps cell symlink when enabled

4. Update .buckconfig generation for tsdeps cell

Similar pattern to go/rust/python integration.
title: Add TypeScript to turnkey module
